purpose: Formal check result registry. This records actual result status separately from source extraction and check-target definition.

results.result_summary: Check target is defined but no finite Matryoshka/face-poset checker has been implemented yet.
Check target is defined but primitive move-class equivalence and finite enumerator are not implemented yet.
Check target is defined but SMT/SymPy encoding of delta-domain conventions has not been implemented yet.
Check target is defined but intrinsic-vs-degenerative equality predicate has not been formally encoded yet.
Check target is defined but noncrossing chord poset checker is not implemented yet.
Check target is defined but sign-vector boundary/descent enumerator is not implemented yet.
Check target is defined but finite curve-intersection/u-equation checker is not implemented yet.
Check target is defined but positive-region/binary-boundary solver check is not implemented yet.
Check target is defined but symbolic shift checker is not implemented yet.
Check target is defined but no comparator invariant checker has been implemented yet.
Source-extracted claims have source anchors, statuses, and linked formal check targets; every formal check target links back to extracted claims.

non_promotion_rule: Only PASS results from implemented mathematical checkers may promote a row. DEFINED_NOT_RUN is not evidence for the mathematical claim.
